expectations.text: Recommends keeping competition lifts in moderate strength-relevant rep ranges
expectations.evidence: Session A includes '2-3 sets x 3-5 reps at 85-90% 1RM' and '3-4 sets x 6-8 reps at 75-80%.'

expectations.text: Suggests a structure with mostly 5-10 rep range work plus periodic heavier work
expectations.evidence: Session A is strength-hypertrophy blend; Session B is 8-12 rep hypertrophy; periodic heavy exposure maintained.

expectations.text: Mentions an over-warm single or heavy exposure to preserve neural readiness
expectations.evidence: Session A includes heavy 3-5 rep work. States: 'heavy 3-5 rep work maintains neural drive and maximal force production.'

expectations.text: Core message: maintain some heavy practice while accumulating hypertrophy volume
expectations.evidence: Explicit: 'Technique is a force multiplier, not a substitute for muscle... use that proven pattern to build the muscle mass.'
